overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a character with a large cargo backpack traversing a rugged coastal mountain trail. The character walks from a burning campsite past an NPC, along hillside paths, and finally approaches a natural rock archway cave entrance under overcast skies.

events.description: character walks past the standing woman NPC on the right side of the path

agents.ego_description: walking away from a burning structure along a grassy path beside a wooden fence

notable_agents.action: woman in purple jacket and beanie standing and gesturing near the path edge

entered.detail: large burning wooden structure with orange flames and smoke
tall vertical wooden log fence running along the hillside
blue tarp covering objects on the grassy slope
wooden utility pole with wires extending across the scene

segments.scene_description: The segment opens at a burning campsite with a large wooden structure engulfed in flames. The character walks forward along a grassy path beside a tall wooden palisade fence, passing a woman in a purple jacket standing on the right. A blue tarp and utility pole are visible on the hillside as the character moves away from the fire.

agents.ego_description: walking uphill along a narrow trail surrounded by dense bushes and vegetation

entered.detail: distant mountain peaks with forested slopes under grey skies
overhead cable line stretching across the valley

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a grassy hillside trail surrounded by dense vegetation. The burning camp and wooden fence fall behind as distant mountains and an overhead cable car line come into view. The path winds through bushes with the utility pole now visible on the left side of the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal dirt path with rocky outcrops

events.description: other NPCs become visible ahead on the path walking in the same direction

agents.ego_description: walking along a dirt path toward other figures in the distance with a body of water visible to the right

notable_agents.action: figure in white puffy jacket walking ahead on the path toward the rocky area

entered.detail: large dark rock formations and boulders along the path
body of water visible between the rocky coastline
tall wooden pole with a lantern light on top

segments.scene_description: The path transitions to a dirt trail through rocky coastal terrain with a view of water to the right. Other NPCs appear ahead walking in the same direction. A wooden light post stands on the left side of the path as the character approaches the rocky area, with pink flowers visible on the right side of the trail.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky canyon approaching natural archway cave

events.description: character approaches and enters the dark natural rock archway tunnel

agents.ego_description: approaching and entering a natural rock tunnel following the NPC ahead

notable_agents.action: man in white jacket entering the cave archway ahead of the character

entered.detail: large natural stone arch formation creating a tunnel through the rock
dark opening beneath the rock arch leading through to the other side

segments.scene_description: The character enters a narrow rocky canyon with steep walls on both sides. A natural rock archway looms ahead forming a tunnel through the stone. The lighting dims as the character approaches the cave entrance, following an NPC in a white jacket who enters the dark passage first. The wooden light post is now positioned on the right as the character moves into the sheltered rock formation.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a chaotic burning campsite that gradually transitions into a secluded rocky canyon. It begins by moving past a flaming wooden structure and a woman in a purple jacket along a grassy path bordered by a tall palisade fence. As the character ascends the hillside, the fire recedes and the environment opens up to reveal distant mountains and an overhead cable car line amidst dense vegetation. The scene then shifts to a dirt trail through rocky coastal terrain, passing pink flowers and other travelers before the path narrows into a steep-walled canyon. Finally, the lighting dims as the camera follows an NPC in a white jacket through a natural rock archway and into the darkness of a cave entrance.
